name: Unearthed Remains
desc_clean: Wurmkin 2 The Wurmkin treat the tunnels of the Bogwurm's Remains as sacred ground, making minor adjustments to the structure to avoid risking its structural stability.
mechanic_summary: Unearthed Remains to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 2 The Wurmkin treat the tunnels of the Bogwurm's Remains as sacred ground, making minor adjustments to the structure to avoid risking its structural stability. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 2 The Wurmkin treat the tunnels of the Bogwurm's Remains as sacred ground, making minor adjustments to the structure to avoid risking its structural stability. Space is limited with no expansions made intentionally. So, when a tunnel collapse leads to a forgotten cavern, you can imagine the Wurmkin's joy — or what passes for joy — at the new space and Echoes to explore.
